description: Create a new Microsoft Edge browser profile named 'OSINT-Research' for isolated open-source intelligence work. Configure the profile with 'Strict' Tracking Prevention, enabled 'Do Not Track' requests, and disabled password saving and address/personal info autofill. Set the startup pages to 'https://osintframework.com' and 'https://www.shodan.io'. Document the applied configuration settings in a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/osint_profile_config.txt.

metadata.occupation_context: Intelligence Analyst - creating isolated research environments
